title: BetterPiglinTrades
description: A simple data pack that increases ender pearl drops from Piglins
body:
A **simple** data pack for 1.21.11 that increases the chance of pigling spawning **ender pearls** and some other items, while reducing the amount of items on the piglin lootable

For **source code** please open the _SOURCE CODE.txt_ file.
To edit spawn rates open piglinbartering.json in VS code (or notepad) and change the spawn chance and count to your prefrences. 

DISCLAMER: _If the pack breaks while editing the code, i will not take **any responsibility**

**Installation Guide**
Extract contents of files and drop into your worlds datapack folder
eg.

_.minecraft/saves/New World/datapacks_
